summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of the new Ops Dashboard (OpsView) + 4 drill-down panels (cross-dept, diagnostics, skills, market) on NXT8. All 21 interactive scenarios passed: navigation, widget drill-down, back navigation, real backend integrations (crossDept coordinate produced LLM synthesis, skills scan discovered 3 skills, skill toggle persisted, market ingest + market scan triggered, diagnostics rescan). No regressions on the other 6 tabs (HOME/CMD/AGENTS/MAP/ALERTS/MIC). BottomNav with 7 items fits cleanly on mobile (358px) and desktop (max-w-md 416px).
critical_code_review_comments: OpsView.jsx line 191: useEffect dependency is [sub] which causes the 30s polling interval to be torn down and recreated every time the user opens/closes a sub-panel. Effectively harmless because load() runs on each change, but the dependency should be [] (or use a separate effect) to keep semantics intentional.

DiagnosticsPanel.jsx: api.diagnosticsScan() is called without try/catch around the await — a scan failure would still flip loading off via finally, but the user gets no visible error. Consider surfacing toast/error state. Same applies to SkillsPanel.runScan and MarketPanel.runScan.
CrossDeptPanel: textarea (data-testid='crossdept-input') uses a non-semantic Enter handling (no submit on Enter). Minor UX nit only.
MarketPanel SignalRow uses cls.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') — fragile string parsing; consider moving border/bg/text into separate keyed objects for safety.
All Ops sub-panels use the same glass-card window-border styling — good consistency. data-testid coverage is excellent across widgets, metrics, inputs, buttons and rows.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: App auto-calls POST /api/seed on first load (idempotent). Test created: 1 TEST cross-dept coordination ('TEST: что у нас по продажам и поддержке?') and 1 TEST market signal ('TEST: Конкурент X запустил free-tier'). These can be left in dev DB or cleaned by main agent if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OpsView + 4 sub-panels (CrossDeptPanel, DiagnosticsPanel, SkillsPanel, MarketPanel) fully validated. data-testids verified: nav-ops, ops-view, widget-crossdept/diagnostics/skills/market, ops-crossdept/diagnostics/skills/market, ops-back, crossdept-input/run, diag-avg-conf/escalation/mock/scanned/scan, skills-scan, skill-toggle-{id}, market-ingest-open/headline/ingest-submit/scan. BottomNav holds 7 items (home, cmd, ops, agents, map, alerts, mic) within max-w-md without overflow at 390px and 1920px. Live integration with backend works end-to-end (LLM synthesis returned in ~5-8s).
